---
title: "Latvian Diaspora Press Published in English-Speaking Countries in the Second Half of the 20th Century"
author: "Timur Mitrofanov"
date: "June 25, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    transition: slide
    controls: true
    width: 1400
    height: 800
    footer: "Latvian Diaspora Press Published in English-Speaking Countries in the Second Half of the 20th Century · Timur Mitrofanov"
    embed-resources: false
---

## Token Analysis

```{=html}
<iframe src="results_token_analysis.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

---

## Topic Word Scores

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Words & phrases combined)</span>

<iframe src="multi-gram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Unigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Single words)</span>

<iframe src="unigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Bigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Two-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="bigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Trigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Three-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="trigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

:::

## Hierarchical Clustering (multigram)

```{=html}
<iframe src="nested_bertopic.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

## Intertopic Distance Map 

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Words & phrases combined)</span>

<iframe src="multi-gram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Unigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Single words)</span>

<iframe src="unigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Bigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Two-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="bigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Trigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Three-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="trigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

:::

## Topics Over Time

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Words & phrases combined)</span>

<iframe src="multi-gram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="650px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Unigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Single words)</span>

<iframe src="unigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="650px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Bigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Two-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="bigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="650px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

### Trigram <br><span style="font-size: 0.6em; font-weight: normal; color: gray;">(Three-word phrases)</span>

<iframe src="trigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="650px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>

:::

## Geographical and Geopolitical entities

```{=html}
<iframe src="Map_journal_origins_2.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

## Most Mentioned Country by Month and Year
```{=html}
<iframe src="country_mentions_interactive.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

## Entities identified by GLiNER 
```{=html}
<iframe src="extracted_entities.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```
